title: Spoilers Betrayal
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Betrayal             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Sat Jan 11, 2020 6:31 pm Hi all, I was listening to the soundtrack of Eva 3.0, and reading the lyrics of "Betrayal". SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: [Spoilers] Betrayal             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Jan 12, 2020 1:29 pm It might relate to the things discussed in part 5/6 of this thread , about how the pilots used to be one and Kaworu is misleading Shinji into fusing back together

[]: Re: [Spoilers] Betrayal             Quote Post by averie69 » Sun Jan 12, 2020 6:28 pm I've seen other people say the lyrics describe the events of the "Eclipse" from Berserk . Seeing as Shiro SAGISU scored the Berserk movies, I think it's safe to say that the song was meant for the "Eclipse", but was never used. In 3.0, Shinji betrays Kaworu's wishes and pulls the twins spears out of Lilith, so Anno/Sagisu/someone else saw that and decided "why not, it'll save time and money".

[]: Re: [Spoilers] Betrayal             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 13, 2020 5:50 am averie69 : So is the idea here that both movies share some crew and involve "betrayal", therefore Q's song about betrayal couldn't have been written specifically for it? Seems pretty flimsy... Unless there's actual behind the scenes info to corroborate the assertion, there's no reason I can see to make it.

[]: Re: [Spoilers] Betrayal             Quote Post by averie69 » Mon Jan 13, 2020 8:29 am Reichu wrote: averie69 : So is the idea here that both movies share some crew and involve "betrayal", therefore Q's song about betrayal couldn't have been written specifically for it? Seems pretty flimsy... Unless there's actual behind the scenes info to corroborate the assertion, there's no reason I can see to make it.

[]: Re: [Spoilers] Betrayal             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Jan 13, 2020 1:12 pm In all fairness, I can see something intended for Berserk being used in Eva and vice versa; however if that were the case, I wouldn't attribute a lot of significance to the lyrics
